case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. RAY MONTGOMERY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
